mechanism_summary: CtxHook folds caller chain into edge-map index so each (call-context, edge) pair along the deep GPOS shaping call chain counts as new coverage, rewarding inputs that progress deeper where bare-edge coverage saturates.
one_line: context-indexed edge map rewards deeper GPOS shaping call paths

mechanism_summary: CtxHook records (call-context, edge) pairs along the recursive hb_shape_full -> verify -> buffer_verify_unsafe_to_break path, retaining intermediate inputs that naive collapses to already-seen bare edges and discards.
one_line: context-sensitive coverage retains seeds through deep recursive shaping-verify path

mechanism_summary: CtxHook makes the same init() edge a distinct coverage bucket per caller (iter_input vs iter_context vs CFF paths), so the layout-matching call path that reaches table_index==1 is retained where bare-edge coverage stops rewarding it.
one_line: per-caller context buckets keep layout init() edge alive across multiple call sites

mechanism_summary: CtxHook turns the GPOS-apply call path into distinct (call-context, edge) slots so reaching matcher/iterator/ChainContext functions via the deeper constructor path counts as new coverage that bare-edge naive ignores.
one_line: context buckets reward GPOS-apply constructor path that bare-edge coverage misses

mechanism_summary: CtxHook indexes the kern-decision edges by caller chain so the same branch in compile() is a fresh (call-context, edge) slot per unique call path, preserving intermediate font-state inputs that naive discards once the bare edge is bucketed.
one_line: context-indexed kern-decision edge keeps varied font-state inputs alive

mechanism_summary: CtxHook makes the same reordering-code edge yield distinct coverage buckets per caller (consonant_syllable vs standalone_cluster vs myanmar), sustaining energy on the syllable-reorder region until havoc assembles the H-then-ZWJ glyph sequence the true branch needs.
one_line: context buckets across reorder callers sustain energy until H,ZWJ sequence found

mechanism_summary: CtxHook records each syllable-segmentation invocation of final_reordering at a distinct (call-context, edge) slot, rewarding inputs that reach the deep reordering path through new contexts and thereby steering toward the rare base>POS_BASE_C configuration.
one_line: per-invocation context buckets drive corpus toward rare Indic base position condition

mechanism_summary: CtxHook logs the final-reordering edge at different map slots per foreach_syllable call context, manufacturing new-coverage signals that accumulate inputs probing the deep reorder arm until one satisfies the ZWJ category test at new_pos+1.
one_line: per-syllable context slots accumulate corpus until halant+ZWJ position condition satisfied

mechanism_summary: CtxHook records the is_halant_use edge at separate slots for each of its two call sites in reorder_syllable_use, manufacturing extra new-bucket signals that retain partial-progress seeds and eventually drive a glyph with H/HVM/IS category into the test.
one_line: dual-callsite context buckets for is_halant_use drive H/HVM/IS category match

mechanism_summary: CtxHook makes the Oriya switch arm for codepoint 0x0B05 a fresh (call-context, edge) bucket so even a single visit under the shaper dispatch path earns new coverage, rewarding seeds with bytes 05 0b that plain edge coverage already considers saturated.
one_line: context bucket makes 0x0B05 switch arm fresh coverage under Oriya shaper dispatch

mechanism_summary: CtxHook folds call-context into the edge-map so the deeply nested Sinhala per-glyph switch arm registers as fresh (call-context, edge) coverage that bare naive already considers seen, driving the corpus toward the 0x0D85 codepoint (bytes 85 0d) across 10/10 trials.
one_line: context bucket makes 0x0D85 Sinhala case arm fresh where bare edge coverage saturates

mechanism_summary: CtxHook folds the caller chain into the edge-map so the MODI-loop switch arm for 0x11600/0x11601 is a new (call-context, edge) bucket along the preprocess_text call chain, preserving seeds with bytes 16 01 that naive discards as already-covered.
one_line: context bucket along preprocess_text chain enables Modi vowel 0x11600 case arm

mechanism_summary: CtxHook turns the Devanagari vowel-constraint edge into a fresh (call-context, edge) slot, rewarding scheduler energy on inputs carrying 0x0906+{0x093A/0x0945/0x0946/0x0947/0x0948} pairs; bare naive sees only an already-covered edge and never refines the second codepoint.
one_line: context bucket rewards Devanagari 0x0906-plus-follower pair toward true switch arm

mechanism_summary: CtxHook makes the deeply nested ORIYA per-codepoint case for 0x0B0F/0x0B13 a new (call-context, edge) bucket that bare naive's single slot never rewards, keeping seeds with bytes 0f 0b / 13 0b until the true case fires.
one_line: context bucket for ORIYA case 0x0B0F/0x0B13 retains codepoint-matching seeds

mechanism_summary: CtxHook makes the Sinhala line-303 switch arm (0x0D8B/0x0D8F/0x0D94) a fresh (call-context, edge) slot under the USE/Indic preprocess_text path, so the sibling 0x0D91 arm already hit by naive never satisfies the 0x0D8x target bucket, driving corpus toward 8f 0d / 8b 0d bytes.
one_line: context bucket separates 0x0D8B/8F/94 Sinhala arm from already-hit sibling 0x0D91

mechanism_summary: CtxHook records the vowel-constraints edge at separate (call-context, edge) slots per shaper call path (preprocess_text_use vs preprocess_text_indic), retaining seeds carrying bytes 91 0d where bare-edge naive collapses them to one already-seen slot.
one_line: per-shaper-path context buckets for 0x0D91 Sinhala arm drive corpus retention

mechanism_summary: CtxHook rewards each new recursion depth of heightOfExprList as a distinct (call-context, edge) bucket, incrementally guiding the fuzzer to deepen SQL nesting until the expression-list loop runs more than one iteration and takes the false branch.
one_line: context buckets per recursion depth incrementally grow SQL nesting past one iteration

mechanism_summary: CtxHook folds the SELECT-parse call chain (sqlite3RunParser -> sqlite3Parser -> yy_reduce) into the edge-map index, making the reducer edge fresh coverage that keeps SELECT-prefixed inputs in the corpus and lets naive_ctx extend the parse incrementally.
one_line: context-indexed yy_reduce edge retains SELECT-prefixed inputs for deeper parse

mechanism_summary: CtxHook registers the LP-select-RP reduce action edge as a new (call-context, edge) bucket along the deep parser call chain, rewarding parenthesized nested-SELECT inputs that bare-edge naive saturates on from shallower paths and never retains.
one_line: context bucket along deep parse chain rewards nested-SELECT LP-select-RP reduction

mechanism_summary: CtxHook records yy_destructor edges at distinct (call-context, edge) slots per parse-reduction call path, so SELECT-driven deep reduction paths earn new coverage that bare-edge naive collapses to already-seen slots and never prioritizes.
one_line: context buckets per parse-reduction path enable yy_destructor true branch via SELECT input
